scripts.backend:setup-pip: cd backend && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.redis:start: redis-server || echo 'Redis server not found. Please install Redis or use Docker: docker run -d -p 6379:6379 redis:alpine'
scripts.redis:stop: docker stop autodev-redis && docker rm autodev-redis
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run redis:start" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run backend:worker" "npm run dev"
scripts.dev:full-conda: concurrently "npm run redis:start" "npm run backend:dev-conda" "npm run backend:worker-conda" "npm run dev"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently "npm run redis:docker" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run backend:worker" "npm run dev"
scripts.dev:docker-conda: concurrently "npm run redis:docker" "npm run backend:dev-conda" "npm run backend:worker-conda" "npm run dev"
